Class GameStateManager

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.controller.manager.GameStateManager
public class GameStateManager extends Object
Manages game state transitions and flags. Handles pause, start, new game, game over, and multiplayer game state management.

      Sets the callback for quitting to main menu (from winning panel).

    • showWinningPanel

      public void showWinningPanel(int winnerPlayerNumber, int timeUsed)
      Shows the winning panel for multiplayer game.
      Parameters:
      winnerPlayerNumber - The player number who won (1 or 2)
      timeUsed - The time used in seconds

    • hideWinningPanel

      public void hideWinningPanel()
      Hides the winning panel.

    • initializeInfoLabels

      public void initializeInfoLabels(javafx.scene.control.Label scoreLabel, javafx.scene.control.Label levelLabel, javafx.scene.control.Label linesLabel)
      Initializes default values for score, level, and lines labels. This is called when starting a new game or resetting game state.
      Parameters:
      scoreLabel - The score label to initialize (can be null)
      levelLabel - The level label to initialize (can be null)
      linesLabel - The lines label to initialize (can be null)

    • resetInfoLabels

      public void resetInfoLabels(javafx.scene.control.Label scoreLabel, javafx.scene.control.Label levelLabel, javafx.scene.control.Label linesLabel)
      Resets score, level, and lines labels to default values. Unbinds properties if bound, then sets default values.
      Parameters:
      scoreLabel - The score label to reset (can be null)
      levelLabel - The level label to reset (can be null)
      linesLabel - The lines label to reset (can be null)
